Reading.description: One time-stamped sample of a single metric.

value.description: The sampled value. Units are the metric's RFC-007 units (°C, %RH, ppm, µmol·m⁻²·s⁻¹, VWC 0–1).

ActuatorState.description: A time-stamped actuator sample: commanded vs observed position (the output-side channel, controller safety §5).

actuator.description: Actuator identifier (e.g. heater, fan, vent, shade, co2_injector, lights, irrigation_valve).

observed.description: Observed (readback) position, or null when unavailable.

TelemetryRange.description: Historical telemetry for one greenhouse over a [from, to] window — the seed the SPA caches and merges with the live WebSocket edge (frontend data model §4, §6). Metrics match the controller's published surface (temperature, humidity, CO₂, PAR, per-zone soil moisture, actuator positions).

from.description: Start of the returned window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

to.description: End of the returned window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

series.description: Map of metric name to its samples over the window.

actuators.description: Actuator state samples over the window.
